diagnosis.current_organization: Moderate - folders separate broad types but some mixing (e.g. receipts in Downloads), no year-based subfolders for receipts or sensitive docs.

actions: Move all sensitive financial documents to Finance folder with year subfolders
Move receipts from Downloads to Finance/Receipts with year subfolders
Remove duplicate photo text files from Pictures/backup to reclaim 20 bytes
Keep Projects folder as is
minimal_effort_plan.expected_benefit: Improved separation of sensitive and financial docs, reduced clutter in Downloads, reclaim small space from duplicates

actions: Implement year-based subfolders for all receipts and bills
Rename generic files like untitled.txt with meaningful names or archive separately
Consolidate photo text files under Pictures with date-based folders
Add README or index files in Finance and Pictures for clarity
medium_effort_plan.expected_benefit: Better chronological organization, easier navigation, reduced ambiguous files

actions: Automate metadata extraction for all receipts and financial docs for indexing
Convert photo text placeholders to actual image files or archive separately
Implement deduplication with automated removal of duplicates
Create a master catalog for all projects with cross-references
best_effort_plan.expected_benefit: Highly structured, searchable, and clean file system with minimal manual overhead

highlights.label: good
highlights.note: Contains only sensitive-related text files, consistent naming, clear single purpose.

highlights.label: good
highlights.note: Well-structured by sessions with consistent naming and clear code/docs separation.

actions: Delete exact duplicate files in Pictures\backup (IMG_2098_copy.txt, sunset_dup.txt).
Delete installer-extract folder Downloads\SetupTool_v3_extracted entirely.
minimal.reclaimable: 20 bytes (duplicates) + estimated 4 files in installer-extract (~small size)

actions: Include all minimal plan actions.
Group Downloads invoices and bills into subfolders by year/month (e.g., Downloads\2025, Downloads\2026).
Create a subfolder in Downloads for old or miscellaneous notes (e.g., Downloads\Archive).
Move Pictures files into year or event-based subfolders if possible (e.g., Pictures\2026).
Keep sensitive Documents folder untouched to avoid risk.
medium.reclaimable: Same as minimal plus better organisation benefits (no direct space gain).

actions: Include all medium plan actions.
Enforce semantic sub-hierarchy across all folders: e.g., Documents\Financial\2026, Downloads\Receipts\2025, Pictures\Events\2026.
Rename files for consistent naming patterns (e.g., date-first or category-first) mirroring Documents and Projects style.
Remove or archive very small or untitled files in Downloads.
Consolidate backup duplicates by deleting copies and keeping originals in main Pictures folder.
Add README or index files in major folders to explain structure.
Consider encrypting or securing sensitive Documents folder.
best.reclaimable: Same as minimal, plus potential small space from removing untitled/old notes files.

output.rationale: The drive shows good folder-level separation and naming consistency in Documents and Projects, but Downloads and Pictures need better grouping and duplicate cleanup.
